name: scratchdb
purpose: Named, disposable DuckDB analytical scratchpads over your data files: load CSV/Parquet/JSONL as live views (never copies), then run SQL across them and get JSON rows. Turns 'analyze these three exports together' into deterministic calls.
reach_for_me_when: you need to analyze several data files together with SQL, not in your head
you are about to write a fragile one-off pandas snippet for a quick data question
you want a persistent named scratchpad to run follow-up queries against

commands.name: load
commands.summary: Register a data file as a live view in a named pad

commands.name: q
commands.summary: Run SQL against a pad; JSON rows, row-capped

commands.name: tables
commands.summary: List views and tables in a pad

commands.name: drop
commands.summary: Drop a whole pad, or one --view in it
